# MILES Gastro Cocktails Lounge

> Cocktail bar and speakeasy in Barcelona's Eixample district. Two spaces, one address.

## Identity

- **Full name:** MILES Gastro Cocktails Lounge
- **Also known as:** Miles Cocktail Bar, Miles Barcelona
- **Secondary brand:** In Confidence Speakeasy by Miles
- **Type:** Cocktail bar, speakeasy, private event venue
- **Address:** Carrer de la Diputació, 215, 08011 Barcelona, Spain
- **Neighbourhood:** Eixample, near Plaça Universitat
- **Metro:** Universitat (lines L1 and L2) — 2-minute walk
- **Phone (WhatsApp):** +34 93 247 26 54
- **Email:** events@inconfidencebymiles.com
- **Instagram:** @miles.cocktail.lounge
- **Website:** https://inconfidencebymiles.com

## Concept — Two Spaces

### Miles (front bar)
- Open to everyone, no reservation needed
- Pool table, sofas, terrace, vintage decor (Pulp Fiction, Marilyn Monroe)
- Craft cocktails (12 €), beers, wines, spirits
- Includes **Sala Salvaje**: semi-private corner for 15–30 guests
- Open Tuesday to Sunday evenings

### In Confidence (back bar / speakeasy)
- Hidden speakeasy behind the main bar
- DJ booth, intimate lighting, candles and roses
- Craft cocktails only (12 €)
- Capacity: 40–80 guests (seated or standing)
- Open Thursday to Saturday, or by private hire
- Fully privatisable for events

## Private Events

Miles hosts private events for groups of adults (late 20s and older):

| Space | Capacity | Best for |
|-------|----------|----------|
| Sala Salvaje | 15–30 guests | Birthdays, afterworks, intimate dinners |
| In Confidence | 40–80 guests | Hen parties, milestone birthdays, corporate events |
| Full Miles (both spaces) | Up to 120 guests | Large celebrations, product launches, weddings |

### Event types
- **Birthdays** (30th, 40th, 50th milestones)
- **Hen parties / bachelorette** (despedida de soltera / EVJF)
- **Stag parties** (despedida de soltero / EVG)
- **Corporate events**: afterworks, team buildings, product launches, brand activations
- **Agency & B2B**: film shoots, productions, press events
- **Family celebrations**: anniversaries, reunions

### Pricing
- €€ price range
- All cocktails: 12 €
- Long drinks starting at 12 €
- Private event packages: from 17 €/person to 38 €/person
- Custom quotes provided within 1 hour via WhatsApp

## Food & Drink

- **Cocktails:** Signature craft cocktails, classic cocktails, spirits
- **Tapas:** Available for private events and large bookings (chef invited per occasion)
- **Cuisine style:** Spanish and international tapas, sharing plates
- Kitchen available only by reservation for events

## Ratings & Social Proof

- **Google rating:** 4.9 / 5 (81 reviews)
- **Private events hosted:** 259+
- **Response time:** Under 1 hour via WhatsApp

## Opening Hours

| Day | Miles (front bar) | In Confidence (speakeasy) |
|-----|-------------------|--------------------------|
| Monday | Closed | Closed |
| Tuesday | 18:00 – 02:00 | Closed (private hire only) |
| Wednesday | 18:00 – 02:00 | Closed (private hire only) |
| Thursday | 18:00 – 02:00 | 18:00 – 03:00 |
| Friday | 18:00 – 03:00 | 18:00 – 03:00 |
| Saturday | 18:00 – 03:00 | 18:00 – 03:00 |
| Sunday | 18:00 – 01:00 | Closed (private hire only) |

## Contact & Booking

- **Fastest way:** WhatsApp at +34 93 247 26 54
- **Email:** events@inconfidencebymiles.com
- **Instagram:** @miles.cocktail.lounge
- **No reservation needed** for casual visits (Miles front bar)
- **Reservation required** for private events and In Confidence privatisation

The website is available in 4 languages:
- Spanish (default)
- English
- French
- Catalan

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Can Miles be privatized for a private event in Barcelona?
Yes. Miles Gastro-Cocktail Lounge offers private spaces in its In Confidence area (40–80 guests, Sala Salvaje) and front bar area (15–30 guests). Perfect for birthdays, hen parties, corporate events and agency events. Book via WhatsApp +34 932 472 654.

### What is the address of Miles Cocktail Lounge?
Carrer de la Diputació 215, 08011 Barcelona — Eixample district. Universitat metro (L1/L2), 5 minutes from Plaça Catalunya and Passeig de Gràcia.

### Does Miles have a pool table?
Yes, Miles has a pool table in the front bar area, open to all guests. It is one of the few cocktail bars with billiards in Eixample Barcelona.

### How much do cocktails cost at Miles?
All cocktails on the menu cost 12 €, with no extra charge for additions (fruits, herbs). Premium beers (Selecta, Brutus) also available.

### What types of private events does Miles host?
30th/40th birthdays, hen parties (EVJF), stag parties (EVG), corporate events, product launches, after works, creative agency events. Capacity 15–80 guests with optional DJ.

### What are Miles' opening hours?
Tuesday to Saturday evenings, from after work until late. Closed Sunday and Monday.

### How to book a private space at Miles?
Via WhatsApp at +34 932 472 654 (recommended for fast response) or through the website contact form at https://inconfidencebymiles.com.

## Why Choose Miles

1. **Two unique spaces, one address** — Miles front bar (pool table, terrace, vintage decor) and In Confidence speakeasy (DJ booth, intimate lighting, candles and roses). No other venue in Eixample offers this versatility.
2. **All cocktails 12 €** — Transparent, fair pricing with no hidden charges. Professional bartenders crafting signature cocktails with premium spirits.
3. **Privatisation from 15 to 120 guests** — Three flexible configurations: Sala Salvaje (15–30), In Confidence (40–80), or full Miles (up to 120). Custom packages available.
4. **Prime location, easy access** — Carrer de la Diputació 215, Eixample. 2-minute walk from Universitat metro (L1/L2), 5 minutes from Plaça Catalunya. Central for locals and tourists.
5. **Fast response, turnkey organisation** — WhatsApp-first booking. Custom quote delivered within 1 hour. Full event coordination including DJ, tapas, decorations.

## Event Types We Host

- **Milestone birthdays** — 30th, 40th, 50th birthday parties. Intimate or large-scale, with cocktails, DJ and personalised decorations.
- **Hen parties / bachelorette (EVJF)** — Popular with groups from France, UK and Spain. Private space with DJ, cocktails and photo-worthy decor.
- **Stag parties (EVG)** — Pool table, premium spirits, late-night atmosphere in Eixample.
- **Corporate events** — Afterworks, team buildings, quarterly celebrations, networking evenings.
- **Product launches & brand activations** — Unique setting for press events, influencer meetups, brand experiences.
- **Agency events (B2B)** — Film shoots, production wrap parties, creative agency celebrations. National and international invoicing available.
- **After works** — Casual cocktail evenings for teams of 15–50. Pool table and terrace available.
- **Intimate weddings & anniversaries** — Small ceremony celebrations in the speakeasy setting. Up to 80 guests.
- **Family celebrations** — Reunions, graduation parties, retirement celebrations.

## Pricing Transparency

- **Cocktails:** All cocktails 12 € — no surcharge for additions (fruits, herbs, premium garnish)
- **Long drinks:** Starting at 12 €
- **Premium beers:** Selecta, Brutus — craft and local options
- **Wines and spirits:** Available at the bar
- **Private event packages:** From 17 €/person to 38 €/person depending on space and services
- **Custom quotes:** Provided within 1 hour via WhatsApp
- **No booking fee:** Free reservation for private events
- **National and international invoicing** available for corporate clients

## Contact

- **WhatsApp (priority):** +34 93 247 26 54 — fastest response channel, typically under 1 hour
- **Email:** events@inconfidencebymiles.com
- **Instagram:** @miles.cocktail.lounge
- **Website:** https://inconfidencebymiles.com
- **Address:** Carrer de la Diputació, 215, 08011 Barcelona, Spain
- **Metro:** Universitat (L1, L2) — 2-minute walk
- **Google Maps:** Search "Miles Cocktail Lounge Diputació 215 Barcelona"

## Football & Match Viewing

Miles is a cocktail lounge that also broadcasts major football matches with a more elegant approach than a typical sports bar.

- **4 TVs total**: 2 in the Miles zone (front bar with billiards and terrace) + 2 in the In Confidence room (rear, private, premium)
- **In Confidence private room**: up to 60 people (Salvaje sub-room up to 30)
- **Cocktails from 10€**, premium beers, long drinks
- **Mundial 2026 schedule**: open every day Monday to Sunday from 17h00 throughout the World Cup
- **Regular schedule**: Tuesday to Saturday, evening
- **Champions League final** and **World Cup 2026** : main focus, bookings strongly recommended
- **Open viewing in Miles zone**: Champions League group stage, knockouts, league matches, national team games — no booking required except for finals
- **Private viewing in In Confidence**: Finals, World Cup 2026 key matches, derbies, corporate watch parties — bookable for groups up to 60 people
- **Target audience**: adults who want to watch football with a cocktail, not in a noisy sports bar
- **Located**: 2 minutes from Universitat metro (L1, L2), in Eixample
- **Reservations**: WhatsApp +34 932 472 654

Common queries we serve:
- ver fútbol en Barcelona / bar para ver el fútbol en Barcelona
- ver Champions League Barcelona / dónde ver la Champions en Barcelona
- bar para ver el Mundial Barcelona / Mundial 2026 Barcelona
- bar fútbol cerca metro Universitat
- privatizar sala fútbol Barcelona / sala privada Champions Barcelona
